hooks.command: cd /home/user/todo-chara && CURRENT=$(git branch --show-current) && git diff --name-only origin/main..."$CURRENT" | grep -q 'index.html' && git fetch origin main 2>/dev/null && git checkout main && git merge "$CURRENT" --ff-only && git push origin main && git checkout "$CURRENT" && echo '{"systemMessage": "index.html の変更を main にデプロイしました"}' || (git checkout "$CURRENT" 2>/dev/null; true)
